full_description: WeatherPal is a weather app that provides current and forecasted weather conditions. It offers features like location-based weather, alerts, and radar imagery. With WeatherPal, you can stay up-to-date with the latest weather forecasts and plan your day accordingly. The app's location-based feature allows you to get the current weather conditions and forecasts for your location. You can also set alerts for severe weather conditions, such as heavy rain, snow, or extreme heat. The radar imagery feature provides a visual representation of the weather patterns in your area, helping you to better understand the weather conditions. Whether you're planning a trip, commuting to work, or just want to stay informed about the weather, WeatherPal is the perfect companion for you.
